tasks.outputArtifact: scope decision log and role-scoped task packet
tasks.doneWhen: Scope, non-goals, owner boundaries, and role handoff tasks are explicit.
tasks.openDecisions: None for fixture; record new ambiguity before execution.

tasks.outputArtifact: screen inventory, five-state matrix, UX acceptance criteria
tasks.doneWhen: Screen inventory and state matrix cover loading, empty, error, success, and permission states.
tasks.openDecisions: None for fixture; unresolved UX decisions return to Product/Planning.

tasks.outputArtifact: route/state impact and API contract review request
tasks.doneWhen: Route, navigation, state ownership, and API dependency impacts are documented.
tasks.openDecisions: None for fixture; unresolved architecture choices are listed before API work.

tasks.outputArtifact: API contract, mock fixture, risk assessment
tasks.doneWhen: Contract, mock fixture, auth/session behavior, and error mapping are ready for mobile implementation.
tasks.openDecisions: None for fixture; unresolved API behavior blocks Mobile App Dev handoff.

tasks.inputArtifact: design handoff and fixed API contract
tasks.outputArtifact: implementation PR and unit/component test result
tasks.doneWhen: Implementation PR includes tests, stable selectors, and linked evidence for the scoped slice.
tasks.openDecisions: None for fixture; unresolved implementation assumptions return to the owning role.

tasks.outputArtifact: Maestro/EAS evidence and failure classification if needed
tasks.doneWhen: QA evidence proves acceptance criteria or classifies failures with the responsible owner.
tasks.openDecisions: None for fixture; unresolved release risk returns to Product/Planning.

tasks.inputArtifact: production submit request if later introduced
tasks.doneWhen: Human approval is recorded before production submit proceeds.
tasks.openDecisions: Production submit decision remains open until human approval exists.

requiredHumanGateCategories: accepting risk after a gate failure
